title: salvia dorrii subsp. argentea
intro: Salvia dorrii subsp. argentea, also known as Utah sage, is a subspecies of the Salvia dorrii plant, which is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an antispasmodic, anxiolytic, and anti-inflammatory agent, which can help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and muscle tension. The health benefits of Salvia dorrii subsp. argentea include its potential to improve cognitive function, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote relaxation, making it a popular herb in herbal medicine. Salvia dorrii subsp. argentea is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to experience its medicinal and health benefits.
